purpose: Blocklist of Cal-Access RCPT_CD donor names that are NOT private contributors. Used by scripts/ingest-cal-access-bulk.cjs to filter at edge-build time. Per audit Remediation #3 (cc_p3_191).
inclusion_criteria: Public agencies disbursing public matching funds (LA Ethics Commission, etc.)
Regulatory transfers / refunds back to a committee
Government funds that flow through the receipts column but are categorically not private donations
out_of_scope: Public-employee unions (those ARE donors — they're voluntary member dues directing political spend)
Government employees giving in their personal capacity (those ARE donors)
review: Code Claude proposes additions when discovery surfaces a new public-fund vehicle. David batch-approves via the editorial-decision-pipeline (Tier 2 per ADR-0029). Direct edits by Claude here require a [pipeline] tag in the commit and explicit reasoning.

non_donor_names.name: City of Los Angeles Ethics Commission
non_donor_names.name_normalized: city of los angeles ethics commission
non_donor_names.rationale: LA municipal matching-funds disbursement. Not a private donor. Surfaced by audit cc_p3_191 as #1 'donor' to Villaraigosa with $7.93M aggregated.

non_donor_name_patterns.rationale: California municipal Ethics Commissions disburse public matching funds (LA, SF, Oakland, San Diego all have these). The rationale for LA generalizes to other cities with the same convention.
